description_long: This is a medium-sized wooden cabinet with a combination of glass-paneled doors on the left and open shelving on the right. The left section features two tall glass doors with visible handles and a series of horizontal shelves inside, suitable for displaying or storing items while keeping them protected. The right section consists of open shelves, some of which are occupied by books and a small potted plant, as well as three pull-out drawers at the bottom. The cabinet stands on four short legs and has a flat top surface that can also be used for additional storage or display. The overall finish is matte brown, giving it a classic and functional appearance suitable for urban interiors such as offices, libraries, or residential spaces. The visible contents and design suggest it is intended for both display and concealed storage.
description: A brown wooden cabinet with glass doors on the left, open shelves and drawers on the right, and visible books and a plant. It features a matte finish and a sturdy, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing glass doors with handles, open shelves with books and a plant, and three drawers.
description_view_1: Left side view showing the solid brown side panel and the cabinet's depth.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, flat brown back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid brown side panel and the cabinet's depth.
